---
title: "Career"
toc: true
---

::: {.section-block}
## Education

- **Ph.D. candidate in Electronic Engineering** (GPA 4.3/4.5)
  Hanyang University, Seoul, Republic of Korea — Mar 2024 – Aug 2027 (expected)
  Semiconductor Nanophotonics Laboratory, Advisor: Prof. Mun Seok Jeong

- **M.S. in Solid-state Physics** (GPA 4.5/4.5)
  Dongguk University, Seoul, Republic of Korea — Sep 2022 – Feb 2024
  Advanced Physics on Electromaterial Laboratory, Advisor: Prof. Kwun-Bum Chung
  Thesis: *"Performance Control of InSnZnO/InGaZnO Multi-Channel-Layered Transistors with Defect Analysis of Amorphous Oxide Semiconductors"*

- **B.S. in Physics** (GPA 4.2/4.5)
  Dongguk University, Seoul, Republic of Korea — Mar 2016 – Aug 2022
  Undergraduate researcher, APEL — Jul 2021 – Aug 2022
  Military Service in the Republic of Korea — Jun 2019 – Apr 2021
:::

::: {.section-block}
## Research Fellowship

- **"Deep-Level Transient Spectroscopy and Nanospectroscopy for Ultrafine Defect Analysis Using Explainable AI in 2D Quantum Semiconductors"**
  Basic Science Research Program, National Research Foundation of Korea (NRF), funded by the Ministry of Education — Sep 2025 – Aug 2027, 50M KRW
:::

::: {.section-block}
## Scholarships & Awards

- HY-BrainKorea G3 2nd Award (Hanyang University), 2025
- IC-PBL Graduate Championship 3rd Award (Hanyang University), 2024
- Dongguk Future Talent Scholarship (Dongguk University), 2022, 2023
- Physics Department Alumni Scholarship (Dongguk University), 2022, 2023
- Dongguk 1.1.1 Scholarship (Dongguk University), 2021
:::

::: {.section-block}
## Skills

- **Spectroscopy:** Optical spectroscopy (Raman, PL), Ellipsometry, DLTS, Tip-enhanced nanospectroscopy
- **Machine Learning:** Physics-based data analysis, Deep learning for experimental data, Explainable AI (XAI)
- **Simulation:** FDTD simulations, Inverse design with adjoint optimization
- **Others:** Electrical characterization (I-V, etc), XPS, Photolithography, Sputtering
:::
